Tasty Bistro in Crystal Lake, IL, has closed its physical location and merged with its sister restaurant, Tasty Sushi in Cary, due to rising costs, with all staff and the menu moving to the Cary location. While the Crystal Lake restaurant is no longer operating, customers can still find the same food and staff at the Cary location, which is located at 630 Northwest Highway. The business is also considering public feedback on how to potentially reopen the Crystal Lake location in the future.

captures.title: TASTY BISTRO sushi,ramen, thai,chinese ., Crystal Lake - Menu, Reviews (157), Photos (56) - Restaurantji
captures.previewText:
Find
Near
SEARCH
TASTY BISTRO sushi,ramen, thai,chinese .
starstarstarstarstar_half
4.4 (157). Rate your experience!
$$ • Asian, Sushi Bars, Thai

Hours: closed today
394 W Virginia St, Crystal Lake
(815) 919-5999

Menu Order Online Reserve

About TASTY BISTRO sushi,ramen, thai,chinese .

TASTY BISTRO is a restaurant that offers a diverse menu, featuring sushi, ramen, Thai, and Chinese cuisine. The ramen, particularly the Tonkotsu Ramen, is praised for its fresh, creamy, and spicy flavors, making it a standout dish. The sushi is also highly regarded, with fresh fish, perfectly balanced rice, and an impressive selection of sake and liquor. The all-you-can-eat sushi for $28 provides good value and is considered one of the best in the Chicago area. Recent visitors enjoyed the welcoming atmosphere, describing it as a delightful and relaxed space, and appreciated the friendly staff, though some noted that service can be slow. The food generally receives positive comments, with large portions and great taste, highlighted by dishes like the Lucky Roll, teriyaki filet, gyoza, and crab Rangoon. The decor has a mix of styles, giving the place a slightly eclectic vibe, but the food remains top-notch. Overall, TASTY BISTRO offers a varied dining experience with some true highlights on the menu, making it a favorite destination for many.

Customers' Favorites

captures.title: Tasty Bistro, Crystal Lake - Restaurant menu, prices and reviews
captures.previewText:
For business
Crystal Lake
Home / USA / Crystal Lake, Illinois / Tasty Bistro
Tasty Bistro
Temporarily closed
400 votes
#11 of 185 restaurants in Crystal Lake 
All photos
Food
Exterior
Interior
Add a photo
43 photos

If you like Chinese and Japanese cuisines, come to this restaurant. You will try nicely cooked shrimp tempura, edamame and dragon rolls. The whole impression won't be complete without martinis that is delicious here.

Food delivery is a big plus of Tasty Bistro. The appealing staff shows a high level of hospitality at this place. Terrific service is something that visitors note in their comments. This spot offers you fair prices for yummy meals. The good decor and peaceful atmosphere let clients feel relaxed here. As for the Google rating, this restaurant earned 4.4.

George LoCoco 2 months ago on Google
Food: 5
Service: 3
Atmosphere: 3
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Dinner
Price per person: $10–20
TAP One 2 months ago on Google
I wish I could rate the service higher, our waiter tried so hard. It was our first visit, on Valentine’s Day with a group of 7. It became crazy busy (not so much at the start of our 5:30 rez), ended up as a 3 hour meal. We wanted to visit, so no complaints about time spent. Drink orders were slow and wrong. Food was brought out 15 minutes apart in the group. Our People seemed to be okay with the quality. Our sushi/sashimi boat for two was high quality. Because it is a cool place, I will give it another shot on a regular night. I hope for a better experience with just 2 or 4 people. I want to like this place for many reasons.
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Dinner
Price per person: $60–70

Service: 2
